data.title: "Wynn Las Vegas' Awakenings show introduces three new acrobatic performances, enhancing the spectacle further. -LAS VEGAS, Sept. 4, 2025 #WYNN"
data.description: In Las Vegas on September 4, 2025, the highly-praised show at Wynn Las Vegas, Awakening, is introducing three new acrobatic acts to its already impressive lineup. Known for its breathtaking displays of strength, grace, and balance, this spectacular production is captivating audiences. The show, listed under the Nasdaq symbol WYNN, continues to amaze with its awe-inspiring performances.

data.title: Quanex Building Products reports Q3 2025 results, repays $51.25M debt, reaffirms synergy target, updates full-year guidance.
data.description: A new segment reporting system has been implemented, contributing to the strengthening of the balance sheet. In the third quarter of 2025, a significant debt repayment of $51.25 million was made. The cost synergy target remains on track, and guidance for the full year has been revised.

data.title: Thor Industries' stock receives a Relative Strength Rating upgrade indicating improved technical performance, reported by Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Thor Industries has experienced a boost in its Relative Strength Rating, indicating enhanced technical performance. The RV maker's stock has shown positive momentum with its RS Rating rising. This news suggests that Thor Industries is garnering increased investor interest and potentially outperforming its peers in the market.
Marimaca Copper reveals A$80 million in new funding through a placement.

data.title: Copart Inc. reports Q4 fiscal 2025 results: revenue $1.1B, gross profit $510M, net income $396M; increase in revenue 5.2%.
data.description: Dallas-based company Copart, Inc. (NASDAQ: CPRT) released their financial results for the quarter and year ending on July 31, 2025. In the three months leading up to July 31, 2025, Copart reported revenue of $1.1 billion, gross profit of $510 million, and net income attributable to the company amounted to $396 million. This shows a revenue increase of $56.1 million, a 5.2% growth; gross profit increase of $56.1 million, marking a 12.4% rise; and a $73.8 million increase in net income attributable to Copart, Inc.

data.title: U.S. Sugar expands ISNetworld use to railroad ops; aims to enhance contractor safety and compliance.
data.description: In Dallas today, ISN, a leading provider of contractor and supplier information management services, revealed that U.S. Sugar, a top agribusiness and railroad operator, has broadened its utilization of ISNetworld to encompass its railroad operations. Following the effective implementation of ISNetworld at U.S. Sugar’s manufacturing plants in Florida and Georgia, the decision to extend it to the railroad division aims to establish uniformity in contractor management company-wide. This move reinforces a culminated effort to enhance safety practices and ensure compliance.

data.title: Cryptocurrency prices dip, with Bitcoin at $110,078.96, Ethereum at $4,302.13. 103,767 traders liquidated for $259.75M in 24 hrs.
data.description: Cryptocurrency markets are down with Bitcoin struggling to stay above $110,000 while Ethereum is at $4,302.13, Solana is at $203.37, XRP at $2.80, Dogecoin at $0.2122, and Shiba Inu at $0.00001208. 103,767 traders were liquidated in the past day for $259.75 million. Data shows net inflows of $301.3 million into Bitcoin ETFs and outflows of $38.2 million for Ethereum ETFs. Top gainers in the last 24 hours include MemeCore, Pump. Fun, and Four. Ethereum ETFs are questioned if overbought, and Polymarket aims to enter the US market. Ripple explores Africa's stablecoin market potentially replacing Tether's USDT with RLUSD. CoinW Founder emphasizes transparency in token listings.

data.title: Kelly L. Palumbo appointed Senior VP, Controller & Chief Accounting Officer at Campbell's, effective Sept. 22, 2025.
data.description: In Camden, New Jersey, Campbell’s Company (NASDAQ:CPB) has named Kelly L. Palumbo as the new Senior Vice President, Controller, and Chief Accounting Officer, starting on September 22, 2025. Palumbo takes over from Stan Polomski, who will transition to the newly established position of Senior Vice President, Business Process Optimization within the Enterprise Transformation Office. In her role, Palumbo will be responsible for leading the corporate controller department and managing corporate accounting and financial operations.

data.title: Mineralys Therapeutics plans $175 million stock offering targeting hypertension, CKD, OSA, and aldosterone-driven diseases.
data.description: Radnor, Pennsylvania - On September 2nd, 2025, Mineralys Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: MLYS), a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, revealed plans to initiate an underwritten public offering of $175.0 million worth of shares of its common stock. Moreover, the company anticipates providing underwriters with a 30-day option to acquire up to an additional $26.25 million in shares at the public offering price, minus underwriting discounts and commissions. Mineralys intends for all securities in the offering to be sold solely by the company. The offering's completion, size, and terms depend on market conditions, with no guarantee of finalization or specifics on the offering's outcome.

data.title: MedImpact's MedEmpower Fuel™ wins PBMI Excellence Award for addressing high-cost health conditions. VP Zach Johnson highlights app's focus on root causes.
data.description: In San Diego, MedImpact, the leading independent provider of pharmacy benefit, health, and technology solutions, revealed that their MedEmpower Fuel™ app received the Excellence Award from the Pharmacy Benefit Management Institute (PBMI). Zach Johnson, the Executive Vice President at MedImpact, emphasized that MedEmpower Fuel focuses on tackling high-cost conditions by addressing their root causes rather than solely managing them post-development. This recognition highlights the app's commitment to revolutionizing healthcare solutions.

data.title: Redwire's CEO to present at H.C. Wainwright 27th Annual Global Investment Conference on Sept 9, 2025. CEO: Peter Cannito.
data.description: Redwire Corporation, a prominent player in space and defense technology solutions, revealed that its Chairman and CEO, Peter Cannito, is scheduled to speak at the H.C. Wainwright 27th Annual Global Investment Conference on September 9, 2025, between 9:00 – 9:30 a.m. ET. Interested individuals can access the presentation at the given web link. Redwire Corporation, publicly traded as NYSE: RDW, is set to showcase its expertise at the event.
